cot_prefix: Okay, today is 9/9/1909. I need to find the date 24 hours later. Let me think. So, 24 hours later would be exactly one day later. Adding one day to September 9, 1909. Now, I need to figure out what date that would be. Well, September has 30 days, so September 9 plus one day would be September 10, 1909. So the answer is 09/10/1909, which would be option
